title: COWEN AND COMPANY, LLC Acquires New Stake in Ares Management Corp
text: On July 25, 2023, COWEN AND COMPANY, LLC (Trades, Portfolio), a renowned investment firm, made a significant move in the stock market by acquiring a new stake in Ares Management Corp ( ARES , Financial). This article aims to provide an in-depth analysis of this transaction, the profiles of the involved parties, and the potential implications for investors.

title: Should You Buy Ares Management (ARES) Ahead of Earnings?
text: Ares Management (ARES) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.

title: Dynamic Renewables Receives Strategic Investment from Ares Management
text: MENASHA, Wis.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Dynamic Renewables (“Dynamic” or the “Company”), a full-service developer, owner and operator of waste management and anaerobic digestion renewable fuel projects across the U.S., announced today that a fund managed by Ares Management's Infrastructure Opportunities strategy (“Ares”) has made a strategic investment to acquire the Company. In addition, an unregulated affiliate of NorthWestern Energy (“NorthWestern”) has acquired a small minority stake in the Company.

title: Ares Management Corporation to Acquire Crescent Point Capital
text: NEW YORK & SINGAPORE--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ares Management Corporation (NYSE: ARES) (“Ares”) announced today that Ares has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire 100% of Crescent Point Capital (“CPC”), a leading Asia-focused private equity firm with approximately $3.8 billion of assets under management, as of March 31, 2023. Founded in 2003, CPC has approximately 50 professionals. The team is headquartered in Singapore and has a presence in China, Indonesia, the Philippines and Vietnam. CPC.

title: These 20 banks have had the largest cuts to earnings estimates
text: Earnings season for the largest U.S. banks will begin on Friday, July 14, when JPMorgan Chase & Co., Citigroup Inc. and Wells Fargo & Co. announce their second-quarter results. Rounding out the “big six” industry group, Bank of America Corp., Goldman Sachs Group Inc. and Morgan Stanley are all scheduled to report on July 18.
